A '''Bith Jedi''' was present at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the [[Yinchorri Uprising]] and played a role in helping the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. He was present during the [[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)|Raid on the Jedi Temple]] and was one of the Jedi who fought the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] there. It is unknown what became of him after the resolving of the uprising. He was one of the few [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to wield an orange [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]]

[[File:RaidOnTheJediTempleJedi-ActsOfWar2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|This Jedi, (to the left of [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]), prepares to fight the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] during their [[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)|raid]].]]
